version: 1.1.0
signing: Play upload key SHA-1 EA:3B (from UPLOAD_* secrets / embedded)
package: com.whoisthere.app (matches Play Console)
note: v1.1 UPDATE — everything from the previous marker PLUS: rematch fixes
  (stranded-lobby join, letters play-again handshake, simultaneous-tap race),
  synced heat round transitions (correct guess closes everyone's typing,
  4s between-rounds interlude with image+answer+winner), topic picking QoL
  (host coverage waives quota, single-category heats, cancel-typing button),
  friends fixes (working invite landing page on both hosts, add-by-code UX,
  global pending-request banner), live admin content (kBundledImagesOnly=false
  — admin image overrides + remote places appear without an app update), and
  bots never guess correctly before 50% of tiles are revealed (all games).
note2: versionCode auto = build-aab run number (strictly increasing; > 23 used at launch).
